description: Japanese chemical company with three segments: Petrochemical (ethylene, vinyl chloride, polyethylene), Chlor-Alkali (caustic soda, chlorine, PVC), and Specialty (high-performance zirconia, silica, zeolites, hafnium oxide for semiconductors, PPS resin, bioscience reagents). Produces Susteel PPS (polyphenylene sulfide) resin — an engineering plastic — supplied to Nagase Plastics for distribution. Also supplies zirconia and high-purity silica used in semiconductor CMP slurries and ceramic components. Hafnium tetrachloride (HfCl4) for HfO2 high-k dielectrics in semiconductors.

_externalRelationships.nagaseRelationship: Confirmed specialty chemicals supplier to Nagase Plastics Co., Ltd. Supplies Susteel PPS engineering plastics. Nagase America also distributes Tosoh specialty chemicals.
keyProducts: Susteel PPS (polyphenylene sulfide) — engineering plastic for electronics
Hafnium compounds — semiconductor high-k dielectric precursors
Toslex zeolite — adsorbents for gas separation

_metadata.dataSource: Nagase Plastics supplier page confirming Tosoh as specialty chemicals supplier, Tosoh IR, Nagase America supplier list
_metadata.notes: Added as Nagase (CMP-0058) key supplier. Financial data not included pending dedicated deep research.
